Inventory Control Excel Template (Free Google Sheet Tool)

Managing inventory is one of the hardest challenges for e-commerce and Shopify merchants. Stockouts lead to lost sales, overstock ties up cash, and spreadsheets often become chaotic and unreliable. Many operators search online for an Inventory Control Excel template because they want a simple, structured way to record stock movements and track quantities in one place.

To solve this, we’ve created a free Inventory Control Template in Google Sheets — built specifically for modern operators who need clarity without needing specialist software. It helps you track SKUs, movements, reorder points, inventory value, and supplier information — all with automated formulas and a clean, intuitive layout.

This article explains what people really want from an inventory control spreadsheet, walks through how the template works, and shows why Verve AI is the natural next step for automated inventory forecasting and purchasing.

Why Inventory Control Matters for E-Commerce

Inventory is almost always the largest cost centre for product businesses. Yet most operators struggle with:

  • Knowing true stock levels

  • Tracking sales, receipts and adjustments in one place

  • Identifying when stock needs replenishing

  • Understanding the value of their inventory

  • Preventing over-ordering (cash trapped in slow-movers)

  • Preventing stockouts of fast-sellers

A good inventory control spreadsheet provides:

  • Structure

  • Accuracy

  • Auditability

  • Reorder visibility

  • A single source of truth

That's exactly what this template delivers.


Get Your Inventory Control Template!


What People Typically Want in an Inventory Control Excel Sheet

Through analysing templates and user demand, people searching for Inventory Control Excel usually want:

✔ A simple table to record all products

SKU, product name, category, supplier and reorder point.

✔ Automatic stock calculations

Stock on hand shouldn’t be manually edited — it should calculate from transactions.

✔ A transaction/movement log

Receipts, sales, returns and adjustments should update inventory automatically.

✔ Reorder alerts

Colour-coded flags for:

  • Out of stock

  • Below reorder point

  • Healthy stock levels

✔ Inventory value

Stock on hand × unit cost for each SKU, plus a total.

✔ A clean dashboard

Total SKUs, total stock value, units on hand, low-stock items and top SKUs by value.

✔ Something easier than full inventory software

Merchants want a simple template that can scale with them.

Our template includes all of these features.

What’s Included in the Inventory Control Template

This template includes six integrated tabs, each designed for clarity and ease of use.

1. Stock List (Master Data + Live Stock Levels)

This is where you store:

  • SKU

  • Product name

  • Category

  • Supplier

  • Unit cost

  • Reorder point

The sheet automatically calculates:

  • Stock on hand (from transactions)

  • Total stock

  • Inventory value

No manual stock editing needed — formulas handle everything.

2. Transactions (Movement Log)

This is where every inventory movement is recorded.

Movement types include:

  • Receipt (restocking)

  • Sale

  • Adjustment (damage/write-off)

  • Return

Positive numbers increase stock, negative numbers decrease it.

This keeps the entire system accurate and auditable.

3. Inventory Summary (Dashboard)

A clean, visual overview showing:

  • Total SKUs

  • Total units on hand

  • Total inventory value

  • Low-stock & out-of-stock counts

  • Top 5 SKUs by stock value

Plus optional charts for:

  • Stock by category

  • Inventory value over time

Great for team updates and planning.

4. Reorder Alerts

A powerful, operator-friendly table that highlights:

  • SKUs below reorder point

  • SKUs out of stock

  • SKUs in healthy range

With traffic-light formatting:

  • Red = Out of stock

  • Amber = Below reorder point

  • Green = Sufficient stock

This is one of the most useful tools for day-to-day planning.

5. Formulas & Methodology

Clear documentation explaining:

  • How stock levels are calculated

  • What each formula does

  • How to add new SKUs

  • How to customise reorder points

  • How to maintain an audit trail

This removes guesswork and makes the template easy to hand off internally.

6. Verve AI CTA (Next Step for Automation)

A short explanation of how Verve AI automates:

  • Stock tracking

  • Variant-level forecasting

  • Reorder point calculation

  • Supplier lead-time modelling

  • Purchase order recommendations

And removes the need for manual spreadsheet updates entirely.

How to Use the Inventory Control Template

Step 1 — Add your products

Go to the Stock List tab and enter your SKUs, product names and costs.

Step 2 — Set reorder points

These help determine when stock needs replenishment.

Step 3 — Log your movements

Every time stock comes in or goes out, record it in the Transactions tab.

Step 4 — View your stock levels

The Stock List automatically updates your real-time stock on hand.

Step 5 — Check the dashboard

Use the Inventory Summary tab to see total value, low-stock items and trends.

Step 6 — Action your alerts

Go to Reorder Alerts to see exactly which products need attention.

This keeps your operations running smoothly and prevents costly mistakes.

Download the Inventory Control Excel Template (Google Sheets Version)

Fully editable, customisable and shareable with your team.


Get Your Inventory Control Template!


Why Most Inventory Spreadsheets Break — and How Verve AI Fixes It

A spreadsheet works great when you have:

  • A small SKU count

  • Simple inventory flows

  • A limited number of transactions

But as your business grows, manual systems become unreliable.

Common failure points:

  • Forgetting to log movements

  • Human error in formulas

  • Reorder points not updated

  • Inventory not aligned with demand forecasting

  • Stockouts from fast-moving variants

  • Slow-moving stock draining cash

This is where Verve AI becomes essential.

A Better Way: Automated Inventory Control with Verve AI

Instead of depending on manual entries, Verve AI:

  • Pulls real-time data from Shopify

  • Tracks stock at variant level

  • Forecasts demand using AI models

  • Includes supplier lead times

  • Calculates reorder points dynamically

  • Generates purchase orders for you

  • Highlights stock risks automatically

  • Helps you avoid both stockouts and overstock

You get a live inventory system without the manual work.

Automate Inventory Management with Verve AI

If you find value in this spreadsheet, you’ll love what Verve AI can do automatically.

👉 View Verve AI on the Shopify App Store

Verve AI takes the guesswork out of demand planning and purchasing — giving operators a clean, accurate and automated inventory control system.

AI Forecasting Software for E-Commerce Businesses
